title: Can anyone help me how can I set color palette for my app
excerpt: I am developing an app the topic is food, So, how can I get color palette which is eye catchy and attractive. If anyone suggest it will be really helpful. Thank you!!

posts.author: Dishant769 (Dishant gandhi)
posts.cookedHtml: I am developing an app the topic is food, So, how can I get color palette which is eye catchy and attractive. If anyone suggest it will be really helpful. Thank you!!

posts.author: VladMonday (Vlad Mystetskyi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Dishant769
You can use our Monday color palette from the Design System: monday.com | A new way of working

posts.author: Dishant769 (Dishant gandhi)
posts.cookedHtml:
but don’t know which color will go for food app I am like confused for colors
I have some in mind can you help then it will be really great

  1. yellow
  2. red
    3.blue

posts.author: VladMonday (Vlad Mystetskyi)
posts.cookedHtml: I would use yellow

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Dishant769,

Agreed with @VladMonday on this one - you can use our Monday color palette from the Design System.

For what it’s worth - my personal vote is on yellow or blue

-Daniel
